_publications._publicationTitle: SVA retrotransposon insertion-associated deletion represents a novel mutational mechanism underlying large genomic copy number changes with non-recurrent breakpoints.

_contextSnippet: SINEs and LINEs spanning the breakpoints were identified by means of the Repeat Masker track of the UCSC Genome Browser...SINEs or LINEs were located at or immediately adjacent to 22 of the 30 breakpoints (73%)...not significantly elevated
details: Identified SINEs or LINEs at or immediately adjacent to 22 of 30 breakpoints (73%) but no significant elevation compared to control dataset
